skeleton <- glue::glue('
---
title: "My document"
author: 
  name: Manuel Schreiber
output: html_document
 header-includes:
   - \usepackage{amsmath}
   - \usepackage{amsfonts}
---

Introduction
---

Some highly informative text.

')

dir.create(here::here("my-document"))
cat(skeleton, file = here::here("my-document", "my-document.Rmd"))
